/app/[locale]/layout.title: aynu.io
/app/[locale]/layout.description: The home of the aynu.io project

/app/[locale]/page.title: To Speak Ainu Again...
/app/[locale]/page.description:
aynu.io builds and publishes open software to keep the Ainu language alive in the modern world. The project is led by <link>Ryo
  Igarashi</link> with the help of a small group of dedicated contributors.
/app/[locale]/page.apps_desc: Here are the projects we've released so far. For access to anything not yet public, feel free to reach out.
/app/[locale]/page.elsewhere_desc: We're also active on the following sites.
/app/[locale]/page.app_entry_tunci: An experimental Ainu machine translation app with dialect support and example sentences.
/app/[locale]/page.app_entry_kampisos: A modern, searchable online corpus for the Ainu language with powerful filtering.
/app/[locale]/page.app_entry_minecraft_ainu: Play Minecraft in Ainu — a full resource pack for the Ainu language.
/app/[locale]/page.app_entry_ainu_corpora: A parallel Ainu–Japanese dataset of over 1.7 million words
/app/[locale]/page.app_entry_ainu_utils: アイヌ語に関する種々の処理を行うライブラリ。Rust、JavaScript、Pythonで利用可能
